description_long: This office building features a modern, rectangular layout with large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light. The structure is primarily white with subtle accents of muted colors on interior walls, and the roof is flat, typical of contemporary commercial architecture. The building includes multiple rooms, visible through the transparent glass, with open-plan office spaces, meeting rooms, and lounge areas. Metal railings line the perimeter of the building's balconies and terraces, adding both safety and a sleek aesthetic. The main entrance appears to be a set of double glass doors, and the window arrangement is highly regular, emphasizing symmetry and openness. No exterior signage is visible, and the overall design is clean, functional, and minimalist, characteristic of International Style architecture.
description: A modern, white office building with expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, flat roof, and metal balcony railings, featuring a clean, minimalist design and open interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, visible interior office spaces, and a prominent balcony with metal railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the regular window pattern, additional balcony space, and more enclosed rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows, more solid wall sections, and a glimpse of interior partitions.
description_view_3: Back view showing minimal window openings, a terrace with plants, and the building's overall rectangular form.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, large rectangular floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in horizontal bands along the exterior walls.
